Soil/Rock Description: Moderately strong, brownish grey spotted yellow, moderately decomposed, medium grained GRANITE with closely spaced, narrow to very narrow, rough undulating, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 15°-35°.
Strong, pinkish grey spotted black, slightly decomposed, medium grained GRANITE, with closely to medium spaced, rough undulating, extremely narrow, clean, joints, dipping 5°-10°.
